title: Things I've learned after 10 years in the industry
summary: Earlier today I read a blog post titled Software development topics I've changed my mind on after 6 years in the industry [^1] and it made me reflect on how my own thinking has (hopefully) evolved over my decade long career. I'm not going to discuss the content of the linked post
